flows.name: Admin Authentication (BlazorAdmin Login)

steps.operation: Receives AuthenticateRequest (username/password)
Validates credentials against ASP.NET Identity
Fetches user + roles, builds JWT claims, signs token with HMAC SHA256
Returns AuthenticateResponse with JWT token
Receives UserInfo; sets HttpClient default Bearer header
Returns AuthenticationState to Blazor auth pipeline

risk_flags: JWT_SECRET_KEY is hardcoded string in source — security risk
CustomAuthStateProvider sets Bearer on shared HttpClient DefaultRequestHeaders — not thread-safe across concurrent requests
open_questions: How does Web (MVC) authenticate? Separate cookie-based flow not visible.

flows.name: Add Item to Basket
flows.entry_point: Web controller / API call (unknown endpoint — not in extraction)

steps.operation: Receives catalogItemId, price, username from HTTP request
Loads or creates Basket for user via BasketWithItemsSpecification
Queries CatalogContext.Baskets with Include(Items)
Adds new BasketItem or increments quantity on existing item
Persists updated basket to CatalogContext

open_questions: Entry point controller/endpoint not in extraction — Web project basket pages/controllers needed

flows.name: Checkout / Place Order
flows.entry_point: Web controller checkout action (unknown — not in extraction)

steps.operation: Receives basketId + shipping address from user
Loads basket via BasketWithItemsSpecification; validates non-empty
Fetches basket with items from CatalogContext
Fetches CatalogItems matching basket item IDs via CatalogItemsSpecification
Creates CatalogItemOrdered snapshot per item; builds OrderItem list
Resolves picture URI template using CatalogSettings.CatalogBaseUrl
Creates Order with buyerId, Address, List<OrderItem>
Persists Order to CatalogContext.Orders

risk_flags: Basket is NOT deleted after order creation — potential orphan basket
No payment processing in this flow — checkout completes without payment
open_questions: Basket cleanup after order: is DeleteBasketAsync called by checkout controller? Not visible.
No payment gateway call visible — intentional demo simplification or missing feature?

flows.name: Basket Transfer on Login (Anonymous to Authenticated)
flows.entry_point: Web login event handler (not in extraction)

steps.operation: User logs in; anonymous session identified
Loads anonymous basket and user basket
Two DB queries — one for anonymous, one for user basket
Copies items from anonymous basket to user basket
Saves user basket
Deletes anonymous basket

risk_flags: Anonymous basket transfer does not validate quantity limits or merge conflicts
open_questions: Where is TransferBasketAsync called? Likely in Web login redirect or cookie event.

flows.name: Admin Catalog Item List (BlazorAdmin)

steps.operation: First render; triggers parallel service calls
Checks Blazored LocalStorage for cached items (1-min TTL)
Parallel: HttpGet catalog-brands + catalog-types + catalog-items from PublicApi
HTTP GET to PublicApi /api/catalog-items; /api/catalog-brands; /api/catalog-types
Server: fetches catalog brands from EfRepository; maps to DTO via AutoMapper
SELECT * FROM CatalogBrands via EF
Client-side join: assigns CatalogBrand/CatalogType names to CatalogItem objects
Stores result in LocalStorage cache

risk_flags: Client-side join of brand/type names — N catalog items require only 2 extra lookups, but this runs on every page load if cache expired
async void DetailsClick on List page can swallow exceptions silently
open_questions: Are there additional Blazor pages for Create, Edit, Delete? Not in extraction but referenced by List.razor.cs
